title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TACLOBAN AIRPORT IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE TO SPEAKER DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ AIRPORT.

chunks.text:
H. No. 735 / 65 OG No. 3, 491 (January 20, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4772, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TACLOBAN AIRPORT IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE TO SPEAKER DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ AIRPORT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tacloban Airport in the Province of Leyte is hereby changed to Speaker Daniel Z. Romualdez Airport.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
